column1: # Argument ordering tests
# Verifies that arguments can be split between prefix (stack) and forward
# (future tokens) at any point around the function word.
# For signature f a b c d, valid call forms are:
#   f a b c d     — all forward
#   d f a b c     — 1 prefix, 3 forward
#   d c f a b     — 2 prefix, 2 forward
#   d c b f a     — 3 prefix, 1 forward
#   d c b a f     — all prefix
# Prefix args fill sig slots from deepest on stack (Args[0]).
# Suffix args continue filling from where prefix left off.
# Same-type args preserve positional order (sub 10 3 = 7).
# 2-param: [Opts Integer] — distinct types
# All forward: {x:4}→Opts, 3→Integer
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f {x:4} 3
# 1 prefix + 1 forward: {x:4}→Opts (prefix), 3→Integer (forward)
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:4} f 3
# All prefix: stack=[{x:4}, 3]. {x:4}→Opts, 3→Integer
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:4} 3 f
# 2-param: [Integer String] — distinct scalar types
# All forward
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] g 5 "val:"
# 1 prefix + 1 forward: 5→Integer (prefix), "val:"→String (forward)
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] 5 g "val:"
# All prefix: stack=[5, "val:"]. 5→Integer, "val:"→String
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] 5 "val:" g
# 2-param: [Integer Integer] — same types preserve order
# sub uses forward-first matching: forward args fill sigArgs[0] first.
# 10 sub 3: forward=[3]→args[0], stack=[10]→args[1], result: args[1]-args[0]=10-3=7
# 10 3 sub: reversed stack, args[0]=3, args[1]=10, result: 10-3=7
# sub 10 3: forward=[10,3]→args[0]=10,args[1]=3, result: 3-10=-7
10 3 sub
10 sub 3
sub 10 3
# 3-param: [Opts Integer String] — three distinct types
# All forward
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] h {x:10} 5 "!"
# 1 prefix + 2 forward
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} h 5 "!"
# 2 prefix + 1 forward
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} 5 h "!"
# All prefix
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} 5 "!" h
# Optional Options with ordering
# Suffix: opts then int
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f {x:10} 5
# 1 prefix (opts) + 1 forward (int)
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:10} f 5
# All prefix
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:10} 5 f
# Optional omitted — just int
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [n]] f 5
# Extra values on stack should not be consumed
# Extra value before args, not consumed
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 99 {x:4} 3 f
# Boolean + Integer — distinct scalar subtypes
# All forward
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] p true 5
# 1 prefix + 1 forward
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] true p 5
# All prefix
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] true 5 p
